---
title: "Ryan Baker"
subtitle: Ideas are bulletproof
image: rybkr.png 
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/rybkr
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/ryanbaker1228
---

Howdy! I am Ryan.

## Education

**Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering**  
Purdue University  
West Lafayette, Indiana | Aug 2023 - May 2026

## Experience

Workplace \| Job title \| April 20XX - present
